violations.text: The door to the outside, located next to the kitchen office, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026
The gasket on the large milk case was not in good repair, with part of it unattached and dangling. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the floor mixer have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of milk coolers have an accumulation of frost and/or water. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2025
The fan covers & soffit have an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025

Chicken was observed held at 121 degrees Fahrenheit on the steam table. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Chicken was reheated, and water temperature in steamtable adjusted higher. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2025

The hand sink in the kitchen has no hot water, and has a hose with continuously running water from the water/floor chemical mixer, so that it is unable to be used. A handwashing sink shall be maintained so that it is accessible at all times for employee use. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024

The door to the outside, located in the hallway, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2023
The hand sink, and the floor cleaner/water mixer were not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2024
Hot water is not available at the hand sink in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024

The door to the outside, located in the hallway, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2023

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a trash bin and large mixing bowl on the floor in front of it. The service line hand sink was blocked by a rolling rack. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was taken to the 3 bay sink to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2023

The door to the outside, located in the hallway, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings observed on the floor in the kitchen and dry storage room. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PCS unknown. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2023

Utensil stored on an unclean surface (top of the mechanical box of the steam kettle) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2023

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the front service area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2023

A cold hold unit on the front service line was not in good repair, nonfunctional at time of inspection. The cold hold unit must be repaired, replaced, or removed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the can opener base have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2023

The floors beneath the food prep sinks, and in the dry storage room have an accumulation of rodent droppings and debris. Cobwebs, dead insects, and debris observed on the floor in the employee toilet room. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2023
Water observed dripping into a container beneath the food prep sink. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/12/2023
One ceiling light in the dry storage area is in poor repair, nonfunctional at time of inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/12/2023
